title: Protein Structure Prediction with AlphaFold
author: Helix Morgan
Computational Biologist
description: Predict protein 3D structure from sequence—but dynamic conformations are missed
content:
AlphaFold predicts 3D protein structures with near-experimental accuracy.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Misfolded Protein Disaster (2039)](/docs/articles/misfolded-protein-2039)
